claim_bullets.bullet_text: void operator always returns undefined (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.35-35).
void operator is a reliable method for generating undefined values (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.35-35).
Using void 0 is the conventional way to produce undefined (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.35-35).

source_record_text: A chapter on JavaScript's void operator, explaining how it evaluates to undefined regardless of the input value.
